name: Taiwanese 16 Spice Black Pork Ribs
ingredients: 5 ribs of pork, cut in 2 inches max
steps: Coat the ribs in cornflour and sweet potato flour.
Prefry the ribs at 160C for 6 minutes.
Refry the ribs at 180C to warm them up.
Toss the ribs in 16 Spice Blend mix.
Serve with basil leaves and on a bed of dried chilies.

other_details.notes: Ideally, the presentation should be on a bed of round dried chilies, but See Woo ran out of stock, so maybe we should use chopped red chilies.
